regime_fall.current_status: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was assassinated on February 28, 2026, and replaced by his son Mojtaba on March 8, 2026, consolidating IRGC hardliner control amid ongoing U.S.-Israeli military campaign involving 9,000+ strikes and 50,000 deployed U.S. troops. Kharg Island oil hub (90% of Iran's exports) was destroyed in mid-March, triggering severe economic collapse while the regime faces succession instability, internal power consolidation under hardliners, and mounting casualties.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei was assassinated on February 28, 2026, followed by Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment as Supreme Leader on March 8, 2026, marking a critical succession event during active conflict.
